title: data.gouv.fr connector
summary: Public data source to register in the contributor catalog and materialize into Onyxia storage/dataprep targets.

security.auth: Public source; destination access controlled by Onyxia/GCS
security.notes: Dataset licence and refresh metadata must be recorded per dataset.

checklists: Open in dataprep or database service
blockers: User decision needed for first datasets and destination target.

notes: Previous direct data.gouv implementation is abandoned for now; this draft keeps the intent under the meta-catalog track.
